name: opentable-mcp
description: OpenTable reservation management for Claude — find slots, book, cancel, list reservations, manage favorites, search restaurants. Relays every request through a companion Chrome extension running in your signed-in opentable.com tab, so there's no cookie paste or bot-wall dance.

tools.name: opentable_list_reservations
tools.description: List the user's OpenTable reservations (upcoming / past / all).

tools.name: opentable_get_profile
tools.description: Get the authenticated user's profile (name, email, loyalty points, metro).

tools.name: opentable_search_restaurants
tools.description: Search OpenTable by term, location, date/time, and party size.

tools.name: opentable_get_restaurant
tools.description: Get full details for a restaurant by URL slug (cuisine, hours, dining areas, etc.).

tools.name: opentable_find_slots
tools.description: List available reservation slots for a restaurant on a given date + party size.

tools.name: opentable_book
tools.description: Book an OpenTable reservation using a fresh slot from opentable_find_slots.

tools.name: opentable_cancel
tools.description: Cancel a reservation given its restaurant_id + confirmation_number + security_token.

tools.name: opentable_add_favorite
tools.description: Add a restaurant to the user's Saved Restaurants.

tools.name: opentable_remove_favorite
tools.description: Remove a restaurant from the user's Saved Restaurants.
